title: Have a Beautiful, Terrible Day!
author: Kate Bowler
subline: Beauty and terror, both, in the same morning.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A horizon line dividing BEAUTIFUL (above, white sun) from TERRIBLE (below, red sliver of moon). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)">
    <!-- The horizon: a single ash hairline across the canvas -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="0" x2="700" y2="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Above: a half-sun (white circle, bottom half cut by horizon) -->
    <path d="M -180 0 A 180 180 0 0 1 180 0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Subtle radial hairline rays -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="0" y1="-20" x2="0" y2="-100"/>
      <line x1="-80" y1="-30" x2="-130" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="80" y1="-30" x2="130" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="-140" y1="-80" x2="-220" y2="-130"/>
      <line x1="140" y1="-80" x2="220" y2="-130"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Below the horizon: a thin red crescent — the terrible part. -->
    <path d="M 380 0 A 60 60 0 0 1 500 0 Z" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A red whisper label below it -->
    <text x="440" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">TERRIBLE</text>
    <text x="0" y="-260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">BEAUTIFUL</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A horizon line splits the lower half: above, a white half-sun (BEAUTIFUL); below, a thin red crescent (TERRIBLE). The two coexist in the same sky — the book's central image. Italic 220px title sits at the top in two lines.
